# Milestone 2A composition fixtures

These anonymised fixtures are generated by `scripts/generate_composition_fixtures.py`.
They cover reordered and renamed schemas, optional/required gaps, extras, type
mismatch, duplicate files/rows, all join cardinalities, unmatched and null keys,
a 100,000-row ten-file append batch, wide pivot, unpivot, unsafe/duplicate split
names, Excel sheet limits, and partial corrupt-file quarantine. Cancellation is a
runtime state and is covered by background-executor tests rather than a data file.
